## Summary
- What does this PR change?
- Why is this change needed?

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] New capability within existing scope
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Scope alignment
Confirm this PR stays within project scope (industrial vibration diagnostics via MCP) and does not introduce unsupported claims.

## Validation
List exact commands/checks used and results.

```bash
# example
# uv run pytest
```

## Documentation impact
- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] Server/skill docs updated (if needed)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (if needed)
- [ ] No documentation impact

## Evidence (if diagnostics behavior changed)
Include before/after plots, tool output, or sample data references.

## Checklist
- [ ] I ran relevant checks locally.
- [ ] I kept changes focused and reviewable.
- [ ] I documented limitations/assumptions clearly.
- [ ] I confirm license compatibility of any added assets/data.
